Source URL: https://www.score.org/contact-us/

# SCORE Contact and Support

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, contact, support

## Resource purpose
SCORE contact page for users who need direct help reaching SCORE or navigating the website.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use if a user asks how to contact SCORE, has trouble requesting a mentor, or needs general SCORE support.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs needing SCORE contact/support rather than a specific resource.

## Source notes captured for BOSS
- SCORE contact details may change; use the live page before giving specific phone hours or contact methods.
- SCORE’s mentor request process remains the preferred route for mentoring help.

## BOSS routing notes
- For Houston users, the local chapter page and mentor request page may be more useful than general contact.
- Do not invent contact details. Send users to the source URL for current contact options.

## Related SCORE links
- SCORE Houston: https://www.score.org/tx/houston/
- Find a mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/
- How mentoring works: https://www.score.org/how-mentoring-works/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
